query:
INSERT INTO promo_codes (id, code, discount_type, discount_value, max_uses, used_count, expires_at, program_types, created_at)
VALUES (
  CONCAT('promo_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()),
  'TESTFREE',
  'percentage',
  100,
  NULL,
  0,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  discount_type = 'percentage',
  discount_value = 100,
  max_uses = NULL,
  expires_at = NULL,
  program_types = NULL;
